_digitalTablet.title: Digital Tablet — Omnibus HL7 FHIR R4 Patient Record Schema
_digitalTablet.author: Generated in conversation with Ken Lee, GP Registrar, RACGP AGPT
_digitalTablet.purpose: Self-describing clinical schema capsule. Paste this JSON into a new Claude chat to restore full clinical context, field mappings, SNOMED codes, LOINC codes, and AU-specific extensions. All placeholders use [[FIELD_NAME]] notation.
how_to_use: 1. Paste this entire JSON as a message or file attachment to Claude
2. Say: 'I am giving you the Digital Tablet — swallow it and restore context'
3. Claude will parse all resource schemas, SNOMED codes, FHIR paths, and free-text tag taxonomies
4. Replace [[PLACEHOLDER]] values with real patient data to build a conformant record
5. Validate against AU Core IG using the NCTS validator: https://r4.ontoserver.csiro.au/fhir
terminology_servers: https://r4.ontoserver.csiro.au/fhir  (NCTS — National Clinical Terminology Service AU)
https://www.tga.gov.au/resources/artg  (TGA ARTG — Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods)
au_exchange_documents: AU eRequesting — referral and pathology/imaging orders

sensitive_field_tiers.tier_1_standard: General clinical record — standard clinician access
sensitive_field_tiers.tier_2_sensitive: Mental health notes | Substance use | Sexual health | HIV status
sensitive_field_tiers.tier_3_highly_sensitive: Domestic violence disclosures | Child protection | Forensic | Genetic
sensitive_field_tiers.tier_4_legal: ACD | DNAR | Capacity assessments | Mental Health Act status

resource_index: Patient — demographics + AU identifiers + extensions
Condition — problem list + HPC freetext tags
MedicationRequest — medications + AMT codes + PBS + freetext tags
AllergyIntolerance — NKA/NKDA + substances + reactions
Observation — vital signs full map + pathology LOINC/SNOMED (80+ tests) + functional/risk scores (40+ tools)
Procedure — surgical procedures (100+ SNOMED codes) + operative freetext tags
Immunization — NIP schedule + travel + occupational vaccines
DiagnosticReport — pathology + imaging modalities + freetext diagnostic tags
FamilyMemberHistory — relationships + heritable conditions (50+ SNOMED codes)
ClinicalImpression — reasoning + DDx + safety netting + capacity
CareTeam — multidisciplinary team roles (25+ SNOMED codes)
CarePlan — GPMP + TCA + MHP + CDM + ACP plan types
Goal — measurable clinical goals with LOINC/SNOMED targets
Consent — all AU consent types including ACD + DNAR + MHR + organ donation
RiskAssessment — 40+ validated clinical risk tools
SDOH_Observations — social determinants full field map (50+ fields)
FreeText_Taxonomy — complete NLP harvest map: SOAP|HPC|ROS|Exam|MSE|Negatives|Abbreviations|Temporal|Obstetric|Paediatric|Mental health tags
Encounter — encounter class + type + hospitalization + discharge
Provenance + AuditEvent — audit trail + ATNA compliance
Practitioner — HPI-I + AHPRA + Medicare provider + prescriber number
Organization — HPI-O + ABN + practice details
Composition — document container + LOINC section codes + SMART on FHIR scopes

tag.display: Digital Tablet — Omnibus FHIR R4 Schema v1.0

_digitalTablet.description: Digital Tablet — Omnibus HL7 FHIR R4 Patient Record Schema. All fields mapped to FHIR R4 resource paths and SNOMED CT AU Edition concept IDs. Placeholders use [[FIELD]] notation. Paste into Claude to restore full clinical schema context.

gender_identity.snomed: 446151000124109 | Identifies as male | / 446141000124107 | Identifies as female | / 33791000087105 | Non-binary |

pronouns.loinc: LA29518-0 | he/him | / LA29519-8 | she/her | / LA29520-6 | they/them |

clinicalStatus.values: active | recurrence | relapse | inactive | remission | resolved

verificationStatus.values: unconfirmed | provisional | differential | confirmed | refuted | entered-in-error
verificationStatus._nlp_note: refuted = explicitly ruled out | provisional = working diagnosis | differential = DDx entry

stage.use: Oncological or disease staging — maps to SNOMED staging codes

_freetext_HPC_tags._note: Harvestable from Condition.note and linked Composition.section[HPC] — LOINC 10164-2
_freetext_HPC_tags.onset: [[When did it start? Acute vs insidious]]
_freetext_HPC_tags.ICE_expectations: [[What patient hopes for from this consultation]]
_freetext_HPC_tags.safety_netting_documented: [[Return if: fever >38.5|worsening SOB|chest pain — who to call]]

MedicationRequest.status: active | on-hold | cancelled | completed | stopped | draft
MedicationRequest.intent: proposal | plan | order | original-order | reflex-order | filler-order | instance-order | option

dosage.timing_codes: BID | QD | TID | QID | Q4H | PRN | NOCTE | MANE | WEEKLY
dosage.dose_unit_UCUM: mg | mL | units | puffs | drops | mcg | g
dosage.asNeeded: [[true|false — true for PRN, document trigger in free text]]

_freetext_medication_tags._note: Harvestable from MedicationRequest.note and clinical note free text
_freetext_medication_tags.ADR_documented: [[Adverse drug reaction narrative — maps to AdverseEvent resource]]
_freetext_medication_tags.deprescribing_discussion: [[Discussion about ceasing: patient reluctant|agreed to trial cessation]]

AllergyIntolerance.note_freetext: [[Full allergy narrative — reaction type, timeline, management, outcome, verification]]

Observation.status: registered | preliminary | final | amended | corrected | cancelled
Observation.category_values: vital-signs | social-history | laboratory | imaging | procedure | survey | exam | therapy | activity
Observation.value_types: valueQuantity | valueCodeableConcept | valueString | valueBoolean | valueRange | valueRatio | valueSampledData | valueTime | valueDateTime | valuePeriod
Observation.interpretation_codes: N=Normal | H=High | L=Low | HH=Critical high | LL=Critical low | A=Abnormal | AA=Critical abnormal | U=Significant change up | D=Significant change down
Observation.dataAbsentReason_codes: unknown | asked-unknown | not-asked | asked-declined | not-performed | not-applicable | error | masked

Procedure.status: preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
Procedure.anaesthesia_types: Local | Regional | Spinal | Epidural | GA | Sedation | Topical | None
Procedure.approach_types: Open | Laparoscopic | Robotic | Arthroscopic | Percutaneous | Endoscopic | Minimally invasive

_freetext_operative_tags.technique_narrative: [[Operative technique in full — often longest free text section in surgical notes]]
_freetext_operative_tags.tourniquet_ischaemia_time: [[Applied HH:MM — Released HH:MM — Total: NN min]]
_freetext_operative_tags.implant_device_details: [[Brand|catalogue number|lot number|serial number — Device recall tracking]]

Immunization.site_SNOMED: 368209003 | Right arm | / 72098002 | Left arm | / 368209003 | Right thigh | / 72098002 | Left thigh |

DiagnosticReport.status: registered | partial | preliminary | final | amended | corrected | appended | cancelled | entered-in-error | unknown
DiagnosticReport.category_LOINC_v2: LAB | RAD | PAT | MB | CH | HM | IM | NMR | CT | US | OT

_freetext_diagnostic_tags.clinical_indication: [[Reason for test as written on request form]]
_freetext_diagnostic_tags.collection_time: [[HH:MM — timed specimens important for cortisol|glucose|drug levels]]
_freetext_diagnostic_tags.critical_result_notification: [[Who was called|at what time|action taken — medico-legal record]]
_freetext_diagnostic_tags.result_comparison_delta: [[Increased from X to Y / decreased / stable compared to DATE]]
_freetext_diagnostic_tags.imaging_comparison: [[Compared to prior imaging of DATE — change noted or stable]]

_freetext_family_history_tags.positive_FH: [[Family member — relationship — condition — age of onset — outcome]]
_freetext_family_history_tags.negative_FH: [[No family history of: ___ — deliberate documented exclusion]]
_freetext_family_history_tags.consanguinity: [[Consanguineous parents — relevant for autosomal recessive conditions]]

ClinicalImpression.description: [[Narrative clinical summary — the Assessment section of SOAP note]]

_freetext_reasoning_tags._note: Richest NLP target in the entire patient record — maps to Composition.section[Assessment] LOINC 51848-0
_freetext_reasoning_tags.SOAP_assessment_full_text: [[Complete A section — synthesis of Sx + Ox + investigation findings]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.SOAP_plan_full_text: [[Complete P section — all management decisions, orders, follow-up]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.differential_diagnoses_ranked: [[1. Most likely DD — evidence for|2. Consider DD — basis|3. Less likely DD — why still on list]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.risk_stratification: [[Low|medium|high risk — tool used e.g. HEART|Wells|PERC|qSOFA|suicide risk scale]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.safety_netting_documented: [[Return if: fever >38.5|worsening SOB|chest pain|unable to tolerate fluids — who to contact]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.red_flags_assessed: [[Alarm features specifically noted: present|absent — unexplained weight loss|haematuria|dysphagia|new neuro signs]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.conditional_plan: [[If X then Y — conditional management logic encoded in free text]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.clinical_reasoning_chain: [[The explanatory thread: evidence → mechanism → diagnosis → management]]
_freetext_reasoning_tags.ICE_addressed: [[How patient's Ideas|Concerns|Expectations were addressed in the encounter]]

CarePlan.status: draft | active | on-hold | revoked | completed | entered-in-error | unknown

GPMP.description: General Practice Management Plan — up to 5 allied health visits/yr under Medicare

MHP.description: Mental Health Treatment Plan — up to 10 Medicare-funded psychology sessions

CarePlan.activity_kinds: Appointment | CommunicationRequest | DeviceRequest | MedicationRequest | NutritionOrder | Task | ServiceRequest
CarePlan.activity_status: not-started | scheduled | in-progress | on-hold | completed | cancelled | stopped | unknown | entered-in-error
CarePlan.goal_references: [[Link to Goal resources — measurable targets for this plan]]

_freetext_careplan_tags.patient_health_priorities: [[Patient-identified priorities — what matters most to them]]

Goal.lifecycleStatus: proposed | planned | accepted | active | on-hold | completed | cancelled | entered-in-error | rejected
Goal.achievementStatus: in-progress | improving | worsening | no-change | achieved | sustaining | not-achieved | no-progress | not-attainable

Functional_independence.target_example: Independent in all ADLs by DATE

Return_to_work.target_example: Return to full duties by DATE

Consent.status: draft | proposed | active | rejected | inactive | entered-in-error

MHR_data_sharing.description: My Health Record — opt-in / default upload preferences

enduring_POA_health.description: Enduring Power of Attorney — health decisions

enduring_POA_financial.description: EPOA financial — relevant for capacity/substitute decision-maker context

Consent.provision_actions: collect | access | use | disclose | correct | transcode | translate | merge | destroy
Consent.provision_purposes_v3: TREAT | HPAYMT | ETREAT | PUBHLTH | HRESCH | CAREMGT | CLINTRCH | CLINTRL | PATRQT

RiskAssessment.status: registered | preliminary | final | amended | corrected | cancelled | entered-in-error | unknown

CHADS2VASC_AF.description: Stroke risk in AF — antioagulation threshold

HAS_BLED.description: Bleeding risk on anticoagulation in AF

Glasgow_Blatchford.description: Upper GI bleed — need for intervention

TUG_mobility.description: Timed Up and Go — mobility and falls risk

SPIKES_protocol.description: Breaking bad news — structured communication framework

MHA_legal_status.values: Voluntary | CTO | Involuntary section | Guardian order

FreeText_Taxonomy._note: Complete taxonomy of harvestable tags from clinical free-text fields. The canonical FHIR home for preserved narrative is DomainResource.text.div (XHTML). Each Composition.section carries a LOINC code identifying its semantic purpose.
FreeText_Taxonomy._fhir_narrative_field: DomainResource.text.div — XHTML block on every FHIR resource

S_Subjective.note: Patient's own words — onset, character, associated symptoms, timeline, ICE

A_Assessment.note: DDx, working diagnosis, reasoning — richest NLP target

MSE_full.insight: [[Full|partial|nil insight into illness and need for treatment]]
MSE_full.judgment: [[Judgment re: treatment decisions|risk|capacity intact or impaired]]

Negative_findings_NLP._nlp_challenge: Negation detection — NegEx algorithm / NLP negation scope — hardest clinical NLP problem

NLP_extraction_targets._note: Linguistic annotation patterns for clinical NLP pipelines: cTAKES | MedSpaCy | GATE ANNIE | Amazon Comprehend Medical | AWS HealthLake
NLP_extraction_targets.negation_context: No | denies | absent | without | negative for | nil | not — NegEx negation scope
NLP_extraction_targets.uncertainty_hedging: possible | likely | probable | cannot exclude | query | ? | consistent with | suggestive of
NLP_extraction_targets.hypothetical_conditional: if pain worsens | should fever develop | were to | in the event of
NLP_extraction_targets.historical_context: previously | in the past | history of | used to | prior to — shifts assertion to past
NLP_extraction_targets.family_context_marker: mother had | father with | sibling diagnosed | family history of — triggers FamilyMemberHistory
NLP_extraction_targets.numeric_value_extraction: Weight 78kg | BP 142/88 | HbA1c 7.2% | dose 10mg — Observation.valueQuantity regex+NLP
NLP_extraction_targets.anatomical_laterality: left | right | bilateral | ipsilateral | contralateral — SNOMED 7771000|24028007|51440002
NLP_extraction_targets.severity_qualifier: mild | moderate | severe | profound | trace | massive — SNOMED 246112005
NLP_extraction_targets.temporal_qualifier: acute | chronic | intermittent | episodic | recurring — Observation.effectivePeriod
NLP_extraction_targets.causal_linkage: due to | secondary to | in the context of | caused by | resulting from — Condition.extension[dueTo]
NLP_extraction_targets.allergy_reaction_narrative: rash after | broke out in | went into anaphylaxis — AllergyIntolerance.reaction.manifestation

AU_abbreviation_library.PEARL: Pupils equal and reactive to light
AU_abbreviation_library.AOx3: Alert and oriented to time place person
AU_abbreviation_library.NSPAH: No significant past and admission history
AU_abbreviation_library.TCA: Tricyclic antidepressant OR Team Care Arrangement — context-dependent
AU_abbreviation_library.RACGP: Royal Australian College of General Practitioners

last_well_date.note: Critical in stroke|sepsis|overdose — treatment eligibility window

review_recall_date.note: 6/52 or review March — extractable scheduling data

SI_screening.elements: Passive vs active ideation | intent | plan | means access | protective factors

HI_screening.note: Homicidal ideation — named intent — duty to warn implications

trauma_history.note: ACE events|PTSD triggers|abuse history — highly sensitive — access controls

MHA_legal_status.values: Voluntary|Involuntary section|CTO — Community Treatment Order|Guardian order

crisis_safety_plan.elements: Warning signs|coping strategies|support contacts|crisis line numbers|safe environment

birth_history.elements: Gestation|birth weight|APGAR 1+5 min|birth complications|NICU admission|feeding initiation

developmental_milestones.domains: Gross motor|fine motor|language|social|cognitive — vs age norms

growth_parameters.elements: Height|weight|HC — centile and Z-score|growth velocity|centile crossing

safeguarding.features: Injury mechanism inconsistent|bruising patterns|delayed presentation|parental affect|failure to thrive

Encounter.status: planned | arrived | triaged | in-progress | on-leave | finished | cancelled | entered-in-error | unknown
Encounter.class_codes: AMB=Ambulatory | EMER=Emergency | IMP=Inpatient | VR=Virtual | HH=Home health | PHONE=Telephone | SS=Short stay
Encounter.priority_v3: EL=Elective | EM=Emergency | R=Routine | S=Semi-urgent | UR=Urgent | CS=Callback
Encounter.admit_source: gp | emd | outp | born | hosp | nursing | psych | rehab | other
Encounter.discharge_disposition: home | alt-home | other-hcf | hosp | long | aadvice | exp | psych | rehab | snf | oth
Encounter.diagnosis_roles: AD=Admission | DD=Discharge | CC=Chief complaint | CM=Comorbidity | pre-op | post-op | billing
Encounter.dietary_preferences: vegetarian | dairy-free | nut-free | low-salt | diabetic | low-fat | kosher | halal
Encounter.participant_types: ATND=Attender | PART=Participant | CON=Consultant | REF=Referrer | SPRF=Secondary performer | PPRF=Primary performer

Provenance.agent_types: author | custodian | verifier | informant | performer | assembler | composer | enterer | reviewer | attester
Provenance.reason_v3: TREAT | HPAYMT | ETREAT | PUBHLTH | HRESCH | CAREMGT

AuditEvent.event_types: rest | 110100 Application activity | 110112 Query | 110113 Security event | 110114 User authentication

Composition._note: Document container — assembles all resources into a structured clinical document. type code classifies the entire document semantically.
Composition.section_empty_reason: nilknown | notasked | withheld | unavailable | notstarted | closed
Composition.section_order: event-date | entry-date | priority | alphabetic | category | patient

SMART_on_FHIR_scopes.specific: patient/Patient.read patient/Condition.read patient/MedicationRequest.read patient/Observation.read patient/AllergyIntolerance.read patient/Procedure.read patient/Immunization.read patient/DiagnosticReport.read patient/CarePlan.read patient/CareTeam.read patient/Consent.read
SMART_on_FHIR_scopes.openid: openid profile fhirUser launch launch/patient offline_access
